summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Jared Fixes landing page. Most functionality working correctly with minor navigation scrolling issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation links (Services, Pricing, FAQ) don't scroll sections into view properly

passed_tests: Page loads successfully with correct title
Contact protection - NO email addresses or phone numbers visible
Sticky navigation renders with all elements
Contact modal opens and closes properly
Contact form has Name, Email, Message fields
Honeypot field present and hidden for spam protection
Back to Top button appears after scrolling
No fix, no pay policy found
All sections render correctly (hero, services, how-it-works, pricing, ai-help, audience, faq, final-cta)
Contact form submission works with success message
Dark theme with orange accents (#ff6a00) implemented correctly
Manrope font for headings, Work Sans for body text
Netlify Forms ready with honeypot protection
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix navigation scrolling behavior - navigation links should smoothly scroll to their respective sections (Services, Pricing, FAQ) when clicked
